name: hot-vs-nice
shortDescription: SVG color exploration tool for testing palette changes, Pantone approximations, and print-oriented variations.
aiDescription: This project is a free open-source creative tool for exploring alternative SVG color directions without adding workflow theater. It imports SVG artwork, extracts used colors, approximates nearby Pantone values, previews CMYK-leaning print-safe shifts, and exports the active SVG variation.
creator: Ali Güzel
useCases: Compare alternative color directions for SVG posters and logos
Approximate nearby Pantone values for print-oriented decisions
Generate and pin multiple palette variations during visual exploration
systemRequirements: Modern desktop web browser for the web build
Windows x64 for packaged desktop builds

notes: SVG color extraction and HEX inventory
SVG export and text overlay controls
